name: spec-driven-development
description: Per-area active docs plus deliberate history review so humans and agents share useful project context without loading every archive.

interface.shortDescription: Compact per-area active docs with optional history review.
interface.longDescription: Use spec-driven-development to keep every project area (main app, prototype, sub-module) carrying compact active documentation for normal work, while decisions, logs, and archives are retrieved only when onboarding or researching history. A coordinator skill gives Codex a broad project-work trigger, routes agents to load the right active context before edits, and keeps docs in sync before completion. Lifecycle hooks surface AREAS.md, seed project-work reminders, and guard completion when project files changed without docs.
defaultPrompt: Help me set up spec-driven docs for this project.
Add a new area to AREAS.md and scaffold its docs.
Make a small project change while keeping the area docs in sync.
